authored_by: QA independent validation (overwrite of BA self-report)

qa.overall_assessment: Iter5 resolves the sole blocker from iter4 (ISSUE-NEW-1): AC10 check object now has a mechanically executable recipe for every THEN assertion, including old_root_form_absent_verification_command and old_root_form_absent_exit_code: 1. Live grep verification on both committed (pre-dev) and working-tree (post-dev) states confirms the check detects the violation and the fix correctly. All iter3 issues remain resolved. M1-M13 coverage confirmed. Exit code contract internally consistent. os.execv atomicity clearly stated. Codex adversarial review surfaced 8 findings; all adjudicated OBSERVATION_ONLY (pre-existing gaps not introduced by iter5). Verdict: PASS, approve.

evidence_quality.detail: All BA claims verified with live grep output. ISSUE-NEW-1 resolution: grep -F '/root/.claude/scripts/execute-push.py' commands/push.md exits 0 on committed HEAD (line 183 old form present — correctly fails check). Same grep exits 1 on working tree (old form absent — correctly passes check). Fail-closed property confirmed: grep exit 2 (file missing) != 1 so infrastructure errors fail the check. AC10 flat-key shape verified in acceptance-criteria JSON at iteration: 5. AC9 awk fence filter verified against current commands/push.md: exits 1 (no os.unlink or rm -f grant in code blocks). All factual claims in the BA spec have grep-level evidence.

scope_alignment.detail: Iter5 scope = fix ISSUE-NEW-1 only. Only AC10 check object modified (two flat keys added). ac_uid bumped to ac10-push-md-tilde-form-branch-arg-v5. No MoSCoW items changed, no new Must requirements added, no existing ACs removed or narrowed. M13 (tilde form, not /root/ absolute) is now fully mechanically verifiable. No universalist claims from the user requirement are un-covered.

investigation_completeness.detail: Iter5 is a targeted AC recipe correction, not a new investigation. No investigation deliverables were required. The iteration added exactly the missing mechanical recipe. The BA self-verification evidence matches QA independently executed greps.

affected_file_accuracy.detail: Two files modified: docs/dev/acceptance-criteria-20260524-125300-push.json (verified: iteration=5, AC10 flat keys present) and docs/dev/ticket-20260524-125300-push.md (verified: AC10 fourth bullet present). Both files exist at claimed paths.

spec_text_vs_execution_drift.detail: After iter5, AC10 THEN text and check object are aligned on all four assertions. Pre-existing AC9 spec_text_vs_execution_drift (grep vs awk pipeline) noted as out_of_scope_observation (pre-existing since iter3, accepted by iter4 QA CHECK-12).

ISSUE-NEW-1.description: AC10 THEN asserted /root/ form absent but check object had no recipe to verify it
ISSUE-NEW-1.resolution: Two flat keys added: old_root_form_absent_verification_command and old_root_form_absent_exit_code: 1

qa_evidence.pre_dev_grep: grep -F '/root/.claude/scripts/execute-push.py' commands/push.md on committed HEAD: exit 0, match at line 183 (correctly fails check — old form present)
qa_evidence.post_dev_grep: Same grep on working tree: exit 1 (correctly passes check — old form absent)
qa_evidence.fail_closed: grep exit 2 (commands/push.md absent) != 1: infrastructure error fails the check
qa_evidence.pattern_coverage: Path-only pattern (no 'python3' prefix) catches any absolute invocation form

AC9_awk_fence_filter.evidence: awk pipeline against commands/push.md exits 1 (no os.unlink( or rm -f grant in code blocks)

AC10_multiline_arg_check.evidence: grep -A8 -F 'python3 ~/.claude/scripts/execute-push.py' commands/push.md present in check object; working tree shows tilde form with all required args

m1_m13_coverage.M1: AC1 GIVEN (grant path schema) and WHEN (execute-push.py invocation)
m1_m13_coverage.M2: All ACs include --branch in WHEN clause
m1_m13_coverage.M4: AC6 (push.sh absent => exit 2); grant-absent sub-case has no dedicated AC (pre-existing gap, out_of_scope_observation)
m1_m13_coverage.M5: AC2 GIVEN covers branch mismatch implicitly via 'any non-head_sha mandatory field is wrong/missing/mismatched'
m1_m13_coverage.M8: AC1/AC2/AC3/AC4 (grant consumed on success, not consumed on exit 1); unlink-failure sub-case not dedicated AC (pre-existing gap, out_of_scope_observation)
m1_m13_coverage.M13: AC10 (tilde form present, old && patterns absent, old /root/ form absent)

exit_code_contract.detail: Exit 2: infrastructure failures (SESSION_ID unset AC8, push.sh absent AC6, os.execv OSError AC7). Exit 1: validation failures (grant invalid/expired AC2, blocked verdict AC4, HEAD drift AC3). Exit 0: never returned (os.execv replaces process). Contract consistent across spec table and all ACs.

execv_atomicity.detail: M10 specifies 'replacing the process image, NOT subprocess'; R6 specifies same; Security Window Analysis section explains timing window elimination.

grant_consumption_order.detail: Grant consumed at step 10 after validation passes. Grant intact on exit 1 (except AC7: grant consumed before sentinel write, sentinel cleanup at M11). AC1/AC5: grant_consumed true. AC2/AC3/AC4: grant_still_exists true.

minor_findings.finding: ticket-20260524-125300-push.md header field 'Iteration:' still reads '3' though this is the 5th BA iteration (iteration 5 in the AC JSON). Cosmetic discrepancy only.
minor_findings.recommendation: BA should update ticket.md header to Iteration: 5 in a future cycle.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 8 findings. Findings 1-3 labeled BLOCKER (branch mismatch not explicit in AC2 GIVEN, grant-absent path not dedicated AC, M4 coverage gap). Findings 4-6 labeled MAJOR (--auto forwarding not verified in mock, M8 unlink-failure path not covered, AC8 exit code assertion). Findings 7-8 labeled MINOR (AC9 spec_text_vs_execution_drift on awk pipeline, ticket.md Iteration header).

findings_adjudication.issue: AC2 GIVEN does not explicitly list branch mismatch as a sub-case
findings_adjudication.rationale: Pre-existing since iter3. Not raised by iter4 QA. Anti-Fraud Principle 7: iter5 scope = fix ISSUE-NEW-1 only.

findings_adjudication.rationale: Pre-existing since iter3. Not raised by iter4 QA. Anti-Fraud Principle 7 applies.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 8 findings adjudicated. None introduced by iter5. All pre-existing. Logged as out_of_scope_observations per Anti-Fraud Principle 7. No changes to draft verdict.

out_of_scope_observations.observation: AC2 GIVEN does not explicitly list branch mismatch as a tested sub-case. M5 coverage relies on implicit 'any non-head_sha mandatory field' language.
Grant-absent path (step 4, grant file not found) has no dedicated AC. M4 coverage gap: AC6 covers push.sh absent but not grant-file-absent.
--auto forwarding not mechanically verified in mock capture. Mock push.sh writes $1/argv[1] only; --auto ($2) forwarding not captured or asserted.
M8 unlink-failure sub-case (grant exists, os.unlink raises) has no dedicated AC. Current tests cover grant-absent and success paths only.
AC8 exit_code_is_not_1: true supplementary assertion redundant; exit_code: 2 exact equality is the real gate. Harmless but could be removed.

AC9 spec_text_vs_execution_drift: THEN text uses 'grep' language but actual verifier is awk fence filter pipeline. Pre-existing since iter3. Consider updating THEN text to say 'awk fence filter exits code 1' in a future cycle.

summary.note: 8 Codex findings logged as out_of_scope_observations (all pre-existing since iter3, not introduced by iter5). Iter5 cycle scope = ISSUE-NEW-1 resolution. Pre-existing gaps (M4 grant-absent, M8 unlink-failure, M5 branch-mismatch explicit, --auto forwarding) are bug-scope items for future cycles.
